channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Paramount looks to put itself in the driver’s seat on Warner Bros. deal with increased bid
item.description: Paramount Skydance CEO David Ellison will have to put all his chips in by a midnight Monday deadline if he wants to pry Warner Bros. Discovery from Ne...

item.title: Domino’s CEO says it’s ‘just not true’ that people are eating less pizza
item.description: Domino’s stock was rallying Monday after a sales beat showed that the quick-service pizza category remains healthy, despite the weakness seen by rival...

item.title: Where Trump’s affordability ideas stand ahead of his State of the Union
item.description: President Donald Trump is likely to tackle the elevated cost of living in his State of the Union address on Tuesday night. Here’s a look at what he ha...

item.title: Medicare Advantage’s once-blistering growth dropped in 2026. Here’s what that means.
item.description: Some Medicare Advantage plans have been quitting unprofitable markets and trimming extra benefits

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs are hemorrhaging billions. Here’s what investors awaiting a crypto turnaround should watch for.
item.description: Investors have pulled roughly $4.3 billion out of spot bitcoin ETFs in the past five weeks, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

item.title: The stars are aligning for this country ETF, says Katie Stockton
item.description: Katie Stockton takes a look at the charts on this ETF tracking South African stocks.

item.title: This Latin American rival to Amazon reports earnings this week. How to trade it with options
item.description: The Street expects MercadoLibre will do about $28.6 billion in revenue in 2025. Operating expenses have grown faster than revenue.

item.title: Gilead Snaps Up Arcellx in $7.8B Cancer Drug Deal
item.description: Gilead's $7.8B acquisition of Arcellx boosts shares 78% amid push for new myeloma drug. Explore the deal, market impacts, and trading insights.

item.title: Dividend-paying real estate stocks are outperforming as AI fears roil markets. Where to find opportunities
item.description: BMO is predicting REITs will move even higher.

item.title: A look at the utility names on Josh Brown's Best Stocks list, including one nearing a multiyear breakout
item.description: Josh Brown and Sean Russo highlight electric utilities on their Best Stocks list.

item.title: NYSE insider Jay Woods is watching this key level in Nvidia as a tell for the S&P 500
item.description: Earnings results from Nvidia, Salesforce and Snowflake could be make-or-break for the market this week as tech faces a big AI reckoning.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...
